A senior US official tells Zeteo's Asawin Suebsaeng that they have heard from foreign counterparts, in this US official’s paraphrase, some version of the following: “Trump wants us to die for him in the Strait of Hormuz, and we aren’t having it.”

Are you subscribed to our First Draft morning email?

Is Trump Losing This War? *LIVE Q&A* With Mehdi

Join @mehdirhasan.bsky.social and @premthakker.bsky.social for 'Ask the Editor,' our weekly live Q&A show, on Monday at 11am ET, 8am PT, or 3pm GMT.

Watch live on Youtube: www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z6YI...

'The Voice of Hind Rajab' didn't win an Oscar tonight. 

Here's a reminder of the smear campaign it faced in Hollywood:

“Donald Trump has gone further than any president before him in enforcing a cult of personality.”

Zeteo's @premthakker.bsky.social reports from “Donald Trump’s Pyongyang”, aka Washington DC, as Trump turns the city into a monument to himself, echoing Kim Jong Un.

Subscribe to zeteo.com!

"This Week in Palestine: Israeli Settlers Kill With Impunity, Israeli Soldiers Rape With Impunity"

Zeteo's new weekly round-up of the stories you may have missed out of occupied Gaza and the West Bank, as Israel continues its genocidal war and apartheid policies.

"Do we really believe the United States would be in this war absent Netanyahu?"

Obama's former deputy national advisor Ben Rhodes talks to @mehdirhasan.bsky.social about Netanyahu’s long campaign for war with Iran and why the U.S. justification doesn’t hold up.

Watch: zeteo.com/p/ben-rhodes...

Pete Hegseth says Iran’s leaders are “desperate and hiding.”

So… who’s this walking around Tehran? 

Sign up for more unfiltered journalism: zeteo.com/subscribe!

"Was This Iran War Planned 30 Years Ago?"

My piece today for Zeteo's First Draft morning newsletter on the 1996 'Clean Break' memo that explains so much of this neocon war that we're seeing in Iran today.

Read/share/subscribe: zeteo.com/p/was-this-i...

"The sooner David Ellison takes over that network, the better."

The Defense Secretary calling for a billionaire ally of the government to take over a media outlet & make it more pro-government. This is what authoritarianism looks like. But in other countries they try & hide it.

The Israeli military has dropped charges against soldiers who were on camera raping a Palestinian detainee. 

@premthakker.bsky.social explains, the whole story is even worse.

"In Beirut, Nowhere Is Safe From Israel's Bombing"

In an on-the-ground dispatch from Lebanon, displaced residents describe the toll of Israel's relentless attacks, as the Israeli military escalates its assault on the capital and advances in the south.

"How the 'Fox News Cabinet' Helped Jumpstart Trump's Iran War"

Sean Hannity, Mark Levin, and Brian Kilmeade mounted a full-court press, urging Trump to attack Iran. 

Great reporting from Zeteo's @justinbaragona.bsky.social and @swin24.bsky.social.

Read/share/subscribe:

Marco Rubio's BFF is an accused foreign agent and money launderer. His trial is about to start — and Rubio is on the witness list.

My @vanityfair.com story on the legal bomb that's poised to go off in Trumpland. 

www.vanityfair.com/news/story/m...

Far-right figure Tommy Robinson posted online a few days ago an interview with Texas Railroad Commission GOP candidate Bo French, where French told Robinson that Muslims are on a "civilizational jihad" & thus "we have to ban Islam." Robinson in turn lauded French for his "bravery."

"Once you cheapen a phrase like antisemitism… when you call Miss Rachel an antisemite, you're completely undermining the very important common struggle we should have against antisemitism.”

Piers Morgan & I discuss Ben Shapiro's attempts to cancel anyone who criticizes Israel.

Exclusive: The award-winning Indian novelist warns that the world is on the brink of nuclear calamity and economic collapse, and laments her own government's gutlessness.

Congressional and Presidential candidates who support Trump's illegal war in Iran could be toast in their primary races, according to our exclusive new poll with @dropsitenews.com. Especially if they are Democrats.

Full results, including on the war's Epstein factor:
zeteo.com/p/new-poll-m...

“It’s the definition of racism.” During a live recording of ‘We’re Not Kidding’ with Alana Hadid, Mehdi goes on a rant against “anti-Palestinian shoe company” Adidas for removing supermodel Bella Hadid from its recent ad campaign. More at Zeteo.com

Piers Morgan: "Unless you can correct me... Me: "I can..." Piers: "...when was the last peaceful intifada?" Me: "In 2011, the Tunisians... the Egyptians..." Piers Morgan & I argue about the word "intifada" & its use on college campuses. #debate #Israel #Gaza #politics #fyp

Introducing Zeteo's flagship podcast, 'We're Not Kidding,' a show where funny people talk about serious things, hosted by Zeteo founder and CEO Mehdi Hasan and regularly featuring internationally acclaimed comedian Bassem Youssef (@bassem). Each episode, Mehdi is joined by a renowned guest for a sometimes lighthearted, sometimes vulnerable conversation about topics they can't discuss anywhere else. The first episode premieres April 25 at zeteo.com #Zeteo #podcast #comedy #politics #fyp

"One of the reasons I am hosting this new weekly show for Zeteo, is that I am fed up with media organizations failing to challenge the racism and bigotry of our leaders, and I am also fed up with media organizations themselves pushing racist, bigoted, dehumanizing coverage of minorities across the board - but especially, especially, of the Palestinians. I think the world deserves better." 🎙️Introducing 'Mehdi Unfiltered'! We’re diving deep into the most pressing issues. In our debut episode, for

Zeteo introduces Mehdi Unfiltered, a weekly interview show that features sharp-edged interviews with newsmakers from around the world, thorough political analysis from experts and DC insiders, plus facts, figures, and unfiltered opinions. Our first show features a hard-hitting interview with former Israeli Prime Minister, Ehud Olmert on Gaza. Watch the full show now at zeteo.com and subscribe now. #EhudOlmert #Israel #IsraeliPrimeMinister #politics #news #zeteo #interview #fyp

Everyone is talking about Zeteo — my new independent media company. Officially launching on April 15, Zeteo will offer a weekly show, podcast, and editorials, plus feature some of the sharpest minds in news and politics. Are you excited? Because we are. Subscribe now at zeteo.com. #MehdiHasan #zeteo #news #politics #journalism #fyp

"Why are we dismissing Ben-Gvir? We're going to ignore the national security minister of Israel? Why would I do that? Because it's convenient for you?" A lively exchange between me &  Jamie Weinstein on The Dispatch podcast as part of our long Gaza debate. #news #politics #debate #Israel #Gaza #fyp

In an exclusive interview with me for Zeteo, South Africa's Foreign Minister Dr. Naledi Pandor calls for Benjamin Netanyahu's arrest, denounces Western countries for supporting Israel, and addresses Elon Musk's criticisms of South Africa. Watch the full interview on our website and become a subscriber at zeteo.com #SouthAfrica #Israel #Palestine #HumanRights #ICJ #NalediPandor #MehdiHasan #interview

Is @unrwa really an antisemitic group that’s only cared about Palestinians? Nope.⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣ ⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣ For the latest in our DEBUNKED! series, I look at the top 7 Israeli myths about UNRWA. ⁣⁣⁣ ⁣⁣⁣ #zeteo #zeteonews #unrwa #mehdihasan #journalism
